desc:
# Agent Python Tools

- repo: oats
- repo_uri: https://github.com/district-solutions/open-agent-tools-coder.git

## File: oats/memory/models.py

Prompts

```
['create a Memory instance with a title, content, and optional tags for persistent storage', 'serialize a Memory object to markdown with YAML frontmatter using to_frontmatter', 'parse a markdown string with YAML frontmatter into a Memory object using from_frontmatter', 'define a MemoryType enum with USER, FEEDBACK, PROJECT, and REFERENCE variants', 'create a Memory instance with a source field set to user, agent, or feedback']
```

Usage

```
{'create_memory_instance': 'create a Memory instance with a title, content, and optional tags for persistent storage', 'serialize_memory_to_frontmatter': 'serialize a Memory object to markdown with YAML frontmatter using to_frontmatter', 'parse_memory_from_frontmatter': 'parse a markdown string with YAML frontmatter into a Memory object using from_frontmatter', 'define_memory_type_enum': 'define a MemoryType enum with USER, FEEDBACK, PROJECT, and REFERENCE variants', 'create_memory_with_source': 'create a Memory instance with a source field set to user, agent, or feedback'}
```
name: oats/memory/AGENT.python.tools.md

oats/memory/models.py.create_memory_instance: create a Memory instance with a title, content, and optional tags for persistent storage
oats/memory/models.py.serialize_memory_to_frontmatter: serialize a Memory object to markdown with YAML frontmatter using to_frontmatter
oats/memory/models.py.parse_memory_from_frontmatter: parse a markdown string with YAML frontmatter into a Memory object using from_frontmatter
oats/memory/models.py.define_memory_type_enum: define a MemoryType enum with USER, FEEDBACK, PROJECT, and REFERENCE variants
oats/memory/models.py.create_memory_with_source: create a Memory instance with a source field set to user, agent, or feedback
